summary: Phase 4 Frontend UI Testing for Dual-Row Evidence/Check Model - All UI components working correctly. The DualRowComplianceSection, EvidenceRow, CheckRow, AgreementRow components render properly with correct data-testid attributes. RecordCheckDialog opens successfully when clicking Update on Check rows. Section expansion/collapse works. Blocking requirements banner displays correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: All compliance components correctly use data-testid attributes for testing
DualRowComplianceSection correctly fetches and renders dual_row_v1 serializer format
EvidenceRow correctly displays file counts, actions (Upload, Add, Request), and expanded file details
CheckRow correctly displays verification status (Verified/Not Recorded) with appropriate badges and Update button
AgreementRow correctly displays completion status with version, completion mode, and verification status
RecordCheckDialog correctly opens with form fields for method, date, outcome, and type-specific fields
Blocking requirements banner correctly shows 2 blocking items: Address Verification and Handbook Acknowledgement

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All UI components render and interact correctly)

seed_data_creation: Used existing test data from Phase 1-3 for employee d88335f6-1b18-435a-8086-28af4a583f77
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 4 Frontend UI for Dual-Row Model fully tested. All components working: DualRowComplianceSection loads with 5 sections (Right to Work, DBS, Identity, Proof of Address, Agreements). Evidence rows show file counts and Upload/Add/Request actions. Check rows show Verified/Not Recorded status with Update button that opens RecordCheckDialog. Agreement rows show completion status with version and mode. Blocking requirements banner shows 2 items. Serializer version dual_row_v1 displayed at bottom.

sections_visible.details: 5 sections found: right_to_work, dbs, identity, proof_of_address, agreements

evidence_rows.details: 4 evidence rows found with correct data-testid attributes and file counts

check_rows.details: 4 check rows found with Verified badges and Update buttons

agreement_rows.details: 2 agreement rows found showing Contract Acceptance (Verified) and Handbook Acknowledgement (Rejected)

record_check_dialog.details: RecordCheckDialog opens when clicking Update on Check rows, shows method/date/outcome fields

section_expansion.details: Section headers clickable, expand/collapse works correctly

blocking_requirements_banner.details: Shows '2 Blocking Requirements' with Address Verification and Handbook Acknowledgement

evidence_row_expansion.details: Evidence rows expand to show file details with view/download actions

check_row_expansion.details: Check rows expand to show method, outcome, checked date, and notes

agreement_row_expansion.details: Agreement rows expand to show version, completion mode, completed date, and status

api_verification.GET /api/employees/{id}/compliance-file: 200 OK - Returns dual_row_v1 format with sections, rows, and summary
